name: vibebuilder-codex-skill-router
description: Vibebuilder Codex Skill Router plugin for automatic task routing, skill handoff, constraint preservation, and fixture-backed evals.

interface.shortDescription: Route Codex work into skills, constraints, and evidence gates.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local Codex plugin example that packages a Codex skill router, automatic route classifier, train/heldout route fixtures, and self-test scripts. It is designed for Vibebuilder-style harness packs where natural-language requests should become route, constraint, skill, and evidence contracts before work starts.
interface.defaultPrompt: Classify this task with the Vibebuilder Codex Skill Router and report the route, constraints, suggested skills, forbidden actions, and required evidence.
